message:
feat(extensions,tools,interactive): expand extension stress testing, tool dispatch, and tree view

- src/bin/ext_stress.rs: extend extension stress test binary
- src/extensions_js.rs: refine JS extension bridge
- src/http_shim.rs: extend HTTP shim logic
- src/interactive/share.rs: refine sharing functionality
- src/interactive/tree.rs: expand tree view rendering (+22/-8)
- src/tools.rs: extend tool dispatch and argument handling (+38/-5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
